personal_info.name: Urjashee Shaw
personal_info.title: Senior AI & Full Stack Engineer
personal_info.current_role: Senior AI & Full Stack Engineer at Simpalm
personal_info.summary: Expert in building scalable AI-driven applications, Agentic RAG systems, and complex ERP platforms. Specialized in Model Context Protocol (MCP), multi-agent orchestration, and cloud infrastructure using Python, Node.js, and AWS.

projects.name: Insurance Policy Agent
projects.description: LangGraph-backed compliance assistant that extracts policy metadata, scans for coverage risks, checks claim readiness, and runs side-by-side policy comparisons.
projects.technical_details: Developed an agentic compliance workflow using LangGraph to automate metadata extraction, risk scanning, and side-by-side comparisons. Integrated Postgres and pgvector for semantic policy and clause retrieval.
projects.challenges: Extracting structured metadata and verifying alignment across varying policy formats with high accuracy.
projects.solutions: Implemented a multi-step LangGraph routing mechanism and formatted schema parsing using GPT-4o, paired with pgvector-based dense retrieval for semantic similarity checks.

projects.name: Job Intelligence MCP + Agentic RAG
projects.description: Multi-agent job search and analysis platform using Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Agentic RAG.
projects.technical_details: Implemented a specialized swarm of agents (Planner, Search, Resume Match, Visa Detection) using MCP to automate end-to-end job search workflows. Built with a vector database for context-aware job analysis.
projects.challenges: Orchestrating multiple specialized agents to handle complex, multi-step job search tasks and ensuring accurate resume-to-job matching.
projects.solutions: Leveraged Agentic RAG for deep context analysis and implemented a robust MCP server architecture for seamless AI model integration.

projects.name: Agentic Research Orchestrator
projects.description: A multi-agent system that autonomously researches topics and critiques its findings.
projects.technical_details: Implemented using LangGraph's StateGraph to manage a cyclic workflow between a Researcher, a Critic, and a Writer. Utilizes persistence for long-running state management and conditional edges for autonomous decision making.
projects.challenges: Managing state consistency across cyclic nodes and preventing infinite loops in agent reasoning.
projects.solutions: Defined strict validation schemas and recursion limits within the StateGraph. Implemented a checkpointing system for full state persistence and recovery.

projects.name: Advanced RAG
projects.description: Cyclic RAG system using **LangGraph + OpenAI GPT-4o + ChromaDB** — runs fully locally, no cloud needed.
projects.technical_details: Developed a Self-Correction RAG pipeline using LangGraph to orchestrate complex flows. The system evaluates retrieved documents for relevance, generates answers, and performs hallucination checks.
projects.challenges: Reducing hallucination rates and ensuring the agent doesn't enter infinite loops when a query is outside the knowledge base.
projects.solutions: Implemented a 'Router' node to identify out-of-scope queries and a 'Grade Documents' node to filter irrelevant context before generation.

projects.name: KAH (Kids After Hours)
projects.description: Internal ERP platform for a U.S.-based childcare provider.
projects.technical_details: Built a robust student enrollment and scheduling engine. Implemented complex state management for staff coordination and multi-site resource allocation.
projects.challenges: Managing real-time synchronization of enrollment data across multiple physical locations while maintaining high availability.
projects.solutions: Utilized AWS RDS for data persistence and implemented an event-driven architecture to handle real-time updates.

projects.name: ATLAS
projects.description: In-house ERP application to manage and relocate victims of human trafficking.
projects.technical_details: Developed a high-security document management system and a sensitive data handling pipeline. Focused on strict compliance and data privacy.
projects.challenges: Ensuring maximum security for extremely sensitive data while maintaining a user-friendly interface for field workers.
projects.solutions: Implemented field-level encryption and strict RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) using Django's security framework and AWS IAM.

projects.name: CASSA (Family Defender)
projects.description: Application that assigns family plans based on survey results.
projects.technical_details: Built a logic engine that processes survey data to generate personalized family plans and advisor connections.
projects.challenges: Scaling the logic engine to handle thousands of concurrent survey submissions without performance degradation.
projects.solutions: Optimized Node.js worker threads and used Redis for caching frequent survey patterns.

projects.name: Sawing High Climbers
projects.description: Operations management system for a tree service company.
projects.technical_details: Automated client proposals and project management workflows. Integrated AWS SES for automated client communications.
projects.challenges: Integrating disparate legacy workflows into a unified digital management portal.
projects.solutions: Created a modular micro-frontend architecture to phase in the new system without disrupting daily operations.

projects.name: INSTANT SECURITY
projects.technical_details: Implemented a real-time matching algorithm for short-term security jobs.
projects.challenges: Handling rapid-fire job postings and applications with low latency.
projects.solutions: Used TypeORM for efficient database queries and optimized the matching algorithm for O(log n) complexity.

projects.name: Gym Drop
projects.description: Platform for purchasing flexible gym day passes.
projects.technical_details: Integrated payment gateways and real-time gym capacity tracking.
projects.challenges: Syncing gym availability from various third-party providers with zero lag.
projects.solutions: Built a robust API wrapper layer to normalize data from multiple external gym management systems.
